caption: A man with blonde hair wearing a black t-shirt and white headphones is shown in a small picture-in-picture window in the bottom-left corner of a video game screen. He is speaking and gesturing with his hands, with a decorated Christmas tree visible behind him. The main screen displays a menu titled "UNOPENED PACKS" against a dark purple background. Along the top, several currency values and a level are listed, including "173,037", "14,609", "2,343,543", and "LV 19 (90)". Five stylized gift-box packs with glowing gems and figures are lined up horizontally. Below these, labels read "ST PRESENT x4", "SMALL PRESENT x6", "LOVELY PRESENT x1", and "BLITZ PRESEN". A "BACK" button is visible at the bottom. As the sequence progresses, the man continues talking and moving his hands while the game menu remains static.
